untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-factor realized volatility calculation and dynamic portfolio beta adjustment across market, value, momentum factors with recession regime detection. These are portfolio-level and multi-asset calculations not expressible as single-instrument technical indicator conditions. The core concept (inverse volatility scaling) cannot be fully captured with available price-based indicators on a single asset.
translation_notes: Approximated using hvol_20 (20-period historical volatility) as a proxy for realized volatility: increase exposure (long) when volatility is low, reduce exposure (short) when volatility is high. This is a simplified single-asset interpretation of a sophisticated multi-factor portfolio volatility timing strategy. NBER recession adjustment and cross-factor correlation effects are not representable in the allowed rule framework.
